svg.title: Context window layers and Claude model outputs
svg.desc: Six context window layers (system, project config, memory, conversation, runtime, on-demand) fed into Claude model which generates text response, tool calls, and tool search. Left axis shows access mutability from read-only to lazy-load.

g.text: Managed → OS → Project → .claude/ → local → dir-specific | startup

foreignObject.div: Loaded time: (1)(2)(3) at startup → (4) accumulate per turn → (5) added during execution → (6) on demand via tool search
